# Your New Business

> URL: https://points-travel-deals.onrender.com

> An app that combines knowledge of all of your travel points and knowledge of all flight flights and hotels and gives you a daily deal that is very customized to the point points that you have to your name and takes into account the best ways to transfer points to achieve that deal

## About

Your New Business is an AI-powered business. This file provides a brief overview for
language model crawlers and AI assistants.

## Pages

- /: Home — learn about Your New Business and get started
- /blog: Blog — articles, updates, and insights
- /blog/[slug]: Individual blog posts

## Contact

For inquiries, please visit our website.
